nasb.text: I will be like the dew to Israel; He will blossom like the lily, And he will take root like the cedars of Lebanon.

esv.text: I will be like the dew to Israel; he shall blossom like the lily; he shall take root like the trees of Lebanon;

cnv.text: 我對以色列要像甘露， 他必像百合花開放； 他要扎根，如黎巴嫩的香柏樹。

ccb.text: 我要像甘露一样滋润以色列， 使他绽放如百合花， 扎根如黎巴嫩的香柏树。
